headline: How The Synopsys (SNPS) Story Is Shifting With The Ansys Deal And 2026 Uncertainty
summary: Analysts have kept their modelled fair value for Synopsys steady at US$537.75, while recent research notes show price targets clustering closer to US$430 to US$455 and around US$480 on the more constructive side. That spread reflects differing views on how quickly the Ansys deal can support earnings, how dependable the core EDA and IP businesses will be through the transition, and what investors should be willing to pay as these factors play out. Read on to see how to interpret these signals...

headline: DraftKings rises on Senate's sports events, prediction markets bill
summary: Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland takes a look at some of Monday morning's trending tickers and stories. US senators have introduced a bipartisan bill to ban sports betting from prediction markets. DraftKings (DKNG) stock is moving higher on the news. Synopsys (SNPS) stock is rising on a Wall Street Journal report that Elliott Investment Management has built a multibillion-dollar stake in the company. Elon Musk's Tesla (TSLA) and SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) are teaming up to build a large chip complex in Texas.

headline: Stocks Rise, Oil Falls as Trump Eases Iran Threats: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A possible de-escalation in the Middle East conflict rippled through markets, with oil falling and stocks rising as President Donald Trump said he’d postpone strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure after what he described as productive talks toward ending hostilities.Brent dropped as much as 14% to $96, before paring the move and hovering near $102 as Iranian media reported there hasn’t been any communication with the US.
